detaileddescription.para: Pure science kernel for gocart scheme in drydep process. This module contains ONLY the computational algorithm with NO infrastructure dependencies. Uses only basic Fortran types for maximum portability and reusability.

SCIENCE CUSTOMIZATION GUIDE:
Modify the algorithm in compute_gocart (search for "TODO")
Add scheme-specific helper subroutines as needed
Update physical constants for your scheme
Customize the environmental response functions

INFRASTRUCTURE RESPONSIBILITIES (handled by host model):
Parameter initialization and validation
Input array validation and error handling
Memory management and array allocation
Integration with host model time stepping

Generated on: 2025-11-14T22:58:26.525574 Author: Wei Li & Lacey Holland Reference: Benchmarking GOCART-2G in the Goddard Earth Observing System (GEOS) Allison B. Collow, Peter R. Colarco, Arlindo M. da Silva, Virginie Buchard, Huisheng Bian, M Chin, Sampa Das, Ravi Govindaraju, Dongchul Kim, and Valentina Aquila, Geosci. Model Development, 17, 14431468, 2024 https://doi.org/10.5194/gmd-17-1443-2024
